workflows.name: Application Startup
workflows.description: The process that occurs when the application is first loaded in the browser
workflows.trigger: User navigates to the website URL

steps.description: Browser loads the HTML entry point and all assets
steps.action: Load and parse HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

steps.description: React application mounts the root App component
steps.action: Initialize React and render App component

steps.description: App component triggers loading of all content files
Content loader fetches and parses all JSON and Markdown files
steps.action: Fetch and parse content from /content directory

steps.description: Content is validated and passed to child components
steps.action: Store content in state and render routes

steps.description: Application renders the requested page based on the URL
steps.action: Match URL to route and render corresponding page

workflows.diagramMermaid:
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant Browser
    participant App
    participant ContentLoader
    participant ContentFiles
    User->>Browser: Navigate to URL
    Browser->>Browser: Load HTML/CSS/JS
    Browser->>App: Mount React application
    App->>ContentLoader: loadAllContent()
    ContentLoader->>ContentFiles: Fetch metadata.json
    ContentLoader->>ContentFiles: Fetch overview.md
    ContentLoader->>ContentFiles: Fetch tech-stack.json
    ContentLoader->>ContentFiles: Fetch architecture.json
    ContentLoader->>ContentFiles: Fetch components.json
    ContentLoader->>ContentFiles: Fetch workflows.json
    ContentLoader->>ContentFiles: Fetch deep-dives.json
    ContentLoader->>ContentFiles: Fetch setup.md
    ContentFiles-->>ContentLoader: Return all content
    ContentLoader-->>App: Return parsed content data
    App->>App: Store content in state
    App->>User: Render requested page

workflows.name: Page Navigation
workflows.description: The process when a user navigates between different documentation sections
workflows.trigger: User clicks a navigation link in the sidebar

steps.description: User clicks a navigation link in the sidebar
React Router updates the browser URL and matches the route
steps.action: Update URL and match to route definition

steps.description: Corresponding page component is rendered with preloaded content
steps.action: Receive content data as props and render

steps.description: Page content is displayed to the user without page reload
steps.action: Update DOM with new page content
